{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323033015088A84BD0D2AE595BF23"}"},"total":23},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608233767838237464","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"余偶阅此卷，初览其名，便觉意趣盎然。文辞虽为网文之体，却不乏巧思，于荒诞中见真情，于戏谑中显风骨。览后犹觉余味不绝。此书甚合我意，诚为佳构！主角性格甚得我心！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771433202,"group_id":"7540342116694625342","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"顺遂无虞，无忧，无虑，安康","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny0kXmEp6tPhARIYDyHOXKzJWVXtKTxl/Eu2YMlGDn/Q","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/72f895f2dbdc4f48808bcb851654bc07~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791873&x-signature=gFaYGF5pUKIa7WyMYo1ddAeGz6U%3D","user_id":"2440504794162892","user_name":"顺岁无虞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2440504794162892","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1719145316,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7540342116694625342","book_info":{"abstract":"好消息：应江喜提能抗超高维攻击的无敌躯体！
坏消息：绑定抠搜系统和疯批主神，肉身不死灵魂照灭，走剧情的同时还得替躯体收集力量。 
主神：“你是天运之子，拯救世界去吧！”
救世主？不，他只想当灭世主。 
在外人眼里，他强到镇群雄、定生死，唯独异能控制不住，每次出手，队友跑得比敌人还快。
“谁说没有完美犯罪？”
应江无奈：“你们都跑了，我异能怎么用？” 
———— 
应江倒在血泊中，分不清身下沾的是谁的血。
“主人，不要死！”马甲颤抖伸手，语气哽咽，“我不是您最锋利的剑吗？为什么……不是我替您承担这一切？” 
下一秒，马甲化剑：“以神之血，偿吾主之命。” 
而应江正站在另一空间，满脸老父亲式无奈，旁观这一切。
遥远之处，神秘人音浪震彻：“无双利刃在手，世间何惧之有？”
应江懂了，马甲是他的剑。
ps：
1.男主前期搞笑爱吐槽，不是好人，一直都没什么道德感
2.不是无限流，披着无限流的皮走剧情

4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10439,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":1438},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1771509708,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606055433421603609","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不想做的大冒险也太好看了，太美味了，看的我爽了又一爽，主角不仅装逼很爽，配角们的人设也很爽啊，就很美味啊，设定也很爽，就超级美味。（接下来都是废话）就是很好看，非常之好看啊，好看。我在床上翻滚，跳跃好美味，好美味，好美味，角色很多都是反差萌啊，就很萌啊！超级萌啊！非常之萌啊！萌到主播要我炸了！哎呀，真的好好看，好好看，好好看，好好看，好好看！！！等着部书大火，我将证明我是前排！！！等后期剧情更加完善，我将美美产粮！！！这点设定也太带感了吧，我去！！！好美味的设定，好美味！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770929688,"group_id":"7540342116694625342","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"＂夜雨声烦＂","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N93bgdFaUhhGlWxLip2C/M4=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cfbba9efe4f14f9786dc436e9b6eb9b1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788896&x-signature=CTEnpA7CEASam%2FTqjJhKn%2FDnpD0%3D","user_id":"682145467340679","user_name":"微笑，懂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"682145467340679","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":2,"fan_ranklist_title":"殿堂粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7540342116694625342","book_info":{"abstract":"好消息：应江喜提能抗超高维攻击的无敌躯体！

遥远之处，神秘人音浪震彻：“无双利刃在手，世间何惧之有？”
应江懂了，马甲是他的剑。
